Streams her games live on Twitch after every match
Refuses to own a gaming console
Only plays retro arcade games on road trips
questions.revealFact: Rodman calls her PS5 a road-trip must-have and used to sneak into her brother's room just to play Fortnite.

questions.prompt: How many minutes has Trinity Rodman logged so far this season?
questions.revealFact: 906 minutes and counting — she's been a fixture in the Spirit's starting XI all season.

questions.prompt: Before she committed to soccer, what did a young Trinity briefly want to be?
questions.revealFact: Long before the goals and gold medals, Trinity dreamed of a career doing makeup.

questions.prompt: What hobby did Trinity Rodman get hooked on off the pitch?
questions.revealFact: She barely read after high school until romance novels — she's a big Colleen Hoover fan — hooked her for good.

questions.prompt: How many of her shots have found the target this season?
questions.revealFact: 14 shots on target this year — she's not just taking chances, she's testing keepers.

questions.prompt: True or False: Before falling for soccer at age four, Trinity also played competitive basketball as a kid.
questions.revealFact: She had the athletic genes for it, but told ESPN dribbling never felt natural — soccer won out.

questions.prompt: True or False: Trinity Rodman scored a hat-trick in the USWNT's 2023 World Cup send-off match against Wales.
questions.revealFact: False — she came off the bench and scored TWO, a memorable brace against Wales, but not three.

questions.prompt: Combining goals and assists, how many direct goal contributions does Trinity Rodman have this season?
questions.revealFact: 3 goals plus 4 assists adds up to 7 — she's setting teammates up as much as she's finishing herself.

questions.prompt: Which youth club did Trinity Rodman play for before turning pro?
questions.revealFact: She racked up four ECNL championships with SoCal Blues before the NWSL ever came calling.

questions.prompt: How many total shots has Trinity Rodman taken this season?
questions.revealFact: 36 shots and climbing — she's one of the most trigger-happy forwards in the league this year.
